description: NTNU R/V Gunnerus navigation, positioning, dynamic-positioning (DP) and azimuth-thruster telemetry, plus two independent high-rate motion-reference (heave/roll/pitch) prediction logs.

datasets.signal_group: Navigation / MRU / DP / azimuth thrusters (ship data logger)
datasets.sampling: ~1 Hz, 2023-10-31 (full day), downsampled evenly to 2000 points
~1 Hz, downsampled evenly to 1500 points (of 7799 total rows)
~1 Hz, downsampled evenly to 1500 points (of 7500 total rows)
